Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand User Input Part 1 Normative Process Behavior Strict Rules Part 2 Desiderata Recommended but Not Strict Event Log Task

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Case by Case against Normative Rules Case 1 Sequence App CC RA LD Approved Inform Finalize Close Matches exactly Normative Violations None Case 2 Sequence App RA CC LD Rejected Finalize Close Violations Risk Assessment performed before Credit Check violates ordering rule Finalize Documentation performed after a Rejection violates rule If rejected do not finalize documentation Implicitly skipping altering the required sequence Case 3 Sequence App CC RA LD Approved Inform Finalize Close Matches strict sequence Normative Violations None

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait the log shows Case 2 does not have Inform Applicant The prompt says Following the loan decision the applicant must be informed of the outcome I missed that initially I need to flag it as a normative violation too

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets double check the prompts explicit desiderata Credit Check within 24h Inform Applicant within 48h of decision Follow up Call before closing I will list these for each case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Case by Case against Desiderata Case 1 CC within 24h Yes Inform within 48h of LD Yes Follow up Call Missing Desideratum not strict Case 2 CC within 24h Yes Inform within 48h Missing entirely Follow up Call Missing Case 3 CC within 24h No 2 days later Desideratum violation Inform within 48h No 51 hours Desideratum violation Follow up Call Missing Desideratum violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check Case 3s Inform Applicant timing LD is Jan 14 1200 Inform is Jan 16 1500 Thats 51 hours greater than 48h So its a desideratum violation Check Case 1s Inform Applicant timing LD Jan 10 1100 Inform Jan 10 1300 2 hours OK

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Structure the Response Introduction Section 1 Normative Rule Violations Case by Case Section 2 Desiderata Failures Case by Case Section 3 Interpretations and Justifications Ensure tone is analytical and matches the prompts structure

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self Correction Refinement during thought Check Case 2s Inform Applicant step The prompt says Following the loan decision the applicant must be informed of the outcome The log for Case 2 completely omits it This is a clear normative violation skipping a required activity I must explicitly state this

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Justifications I need to suggest plausible reasons for deviations without contradicting the rules Eg Case 2 might have had an automated system that ran RA first or a manual override due to urgency and the finalization after rejection might be a clerical error or misconfigured workflow Case 3s delays might be due to staffing shortages system downtime or high volume The missing follow up calls could be due to resource constraints or digital only communication being preferred

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check constraint If the loan is rejected the case should be closed without finalizing documentation Case 2 violates Check constraint Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment Case 2 violates Check constraint Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision Case 2 violates missing entirely Desiderata Case 1 Meets timing misses follow up Case 2 CC within 24h met Inform missing strict violation plus desideratum miss Follow up missing Case 3 CC greater than 24h Inform greater than 48h Follow up missing
